name: Workout
description: Embedded-agent training log. Tell the Workout agent what you did — "three sets of deadlifts and one hour climbing" — and it maintains entries.json while the structured, editable log refreshes after each turn. Includes strength PRs (e1RM), cardio bests, weekly category volume, per-category stats, and a year-at-a-glance streak heatmap.
author: mobius-os
